auth.inactiveAccount: This account is inactive — contact your clinic admin

patients.title: Patients
patients.emptyHint: Start building your patient base — add your first patient.

fields.name: Name
fields.sourceHint: How did they find the clinic? Guides your marketing

form.consentRequired: A patient file cannot be created without consent
form.contactRequired: Enter at least a WhatsApp or phone number
form.saveFailed: Could not save — please try again

consent.title: Data processing consent
consent.text: I consent to the clinic collecting and processing the personal and health data in this form for the purpose of providing clinic services, managing appointments, and contacting me about them. I acknowledge that the data is stored and processed on secure servers outside the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan, and that I have the right to request correction or deletion of my data at any time.
consent.checkboxLabel: I obtained the patient's explicit consent to the above

profile.visitsEmpty: No visits yet — visits appear here once appointments are completed
profile.medicalNotesRestricted: Medical notes are available to the practitioner and owner only
profile.deleteConfirmText: {name}'s file and all related data (visits, appointments, notes) will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

services.title: Services
services.emptyHint: Define your clinic's services and prices to start booking and selling.
services.viewOnlyHint: View only — editing services is available to owners and admins.

fields.name: Service name
fields.followupHint: After how many days should the patient return? (e.g. filler 270 days)

form.saveFailed: Could not save — please try again

delete.confirmText: "{name}" will be removed from the service catalog. This cannot be undone.

packages.title: Packages
packages.emptyHint: Bundle several services into a package at a special price.
packages.viewOnlyHint: View only — editing packages is available to owners and admins.

items.title: Package services
items.empty: Add at least one service to the package

form.saveFailed: Could not save — please try again

delete.confirmText: "{name}" will be removed. This cannot be undone.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.viewOnlyHint: View only — booking is available to authorized clinic staff.

form.timeConflict: This practitioner already has an appointment at that time — pick another time or practitioner.
form.saveFailed: Could not save — please try again
form.durationHint: The appointment's end time is computed from the service duration.

delete.confirmText: {patient}'s appointment will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

sales.title: Sales
sales.emptyHint: Record your first sale to start tracking clinic revenue.
sales.viewOnlyHint: View only — recording sales is available to authorized clinic staff.

payment.label: Payment method
payment.cashHint: Paid in cash at the clinic
payment.coveredHint: No payment needed — sessions are drawn from the package balance.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.selectPatientFirst: Select the patient first to see their packages
checkout.noActivePackages: No active packages for this patient

errors.insufficientSessions: Not enough sessions left in the package
errors.saveFailed: Could not record payment — please try again

delete.confirmText: {patient}'s invoice will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

followups.title: Due for Contact Today
followups.subtitle: Patients it's time to reach out to — a graceful message, one click away.
followups.emptyDue: No follow-ups due today — beautifully done! 🌿
followups.emptyPackages: No packages need a reminder right now

due.overdue: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} overdue
due.sessionsRemaining: {count, plural, one {# session left} other {# sessions left}}

templates.service:
Hello {name} 🌿
We hope you're keeping well. It's been a little while since your last {service} visit at {clinic}, and we'd love to welcome you back for a follow-up to keep your results at their best.
Whenever suits you, we'd be delighted to arrange your appointment. 💐
templates.package:
Hello {name} 🌿
A gentle reminder that you have {count} sessions remaining in your package at {clinic}. We'd be delighted to schedule your next session at a time that suits you. 💐

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Your clinic's performance at a glance — revenue, retention, and the channels that bring patients in.

kpis.returningHint: {returning} returning, {fresh} new among this period's visitors

sources.title: Patient sources
sources.empty: No new patients in this period

practitioners.title: Practitioner performance
practitioners.empty: No practitioner-attributed sales in this period

onboarding.intro: Let's set up your clinic in a few minutes. You can change anything later in Settings.

clinic.title: Let's start with your clinic
clinic.hint: Your name and logo appear across the app and on invoices.

hours.title: When do you see patients?
hours.hint: Used later to prevent bookings outside working hours.

service.title: Add your first service
service.hint: You can add more later. Skip if you'd rather set this up afterward.

staff.title: Invite your team
staff.hint: Create an account for your first staff member, or skip and add them later.

done.title: Your clinic is ready! 🎉
done.subtitle: Everything's set up. You're good to go.

clinic.name: Clinic name
clinic.logoHint: PNG or JPG, up to 2 MB.
clinic.saveFailed: Could not save — please try again

hours.title: Business hours
hours.hint: The days and times you see patients.

permissions.title: Practitioner permissions
permissions.onHint: Practitioners can record services, sales, and medical notes themselves.
permissions.offHint: Practitioners view their appointments and patients and add medical notes only — reception handles data entry.
permissions.note: Medical notes stay restricted to the practitioner and owner in all cases.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.hint: To manage your subscription, contact the Clinics System team.

staff.title: Clinic team
staff.subtitle: Invite colleagues, assign roles, and enable or disable access instantly.

inviteDialog.title: Invite a new member
inviteDialog.name: Name
inviteDialog.invalid: Enter a valid name and email
inviteDialog.emailInUse: This email is already in use
inviteDialog.failed: Could not create the account — please try again

credentials.title: Account created 🎉
credentials.hint: Share these sign-in details with the member. The password won't be shown again.
